title: VQE Beacon Batch Payload
description: HTTP POST body for a batch of QoE beacons submitted by the VQE SDK. Multiple beacons may be included in a single request to reduce connection overhead.

beacons.description: Ordered array of beacons. Must be in ascending seq order. A batch will always contain beacons from a single play session.

Beacon.description: A single beacon. All beacons share seq, play_id, ts, and event. Additional fields are event-specific.

seq.description: Monotonically increasing integer scoped to the play session, starting at 0 for session_open. Gaps indicate lost beacons.

play_id.description: UUID v4 generated by the SDK at PlayAttempt. Uniquely identifies a single play session across all beacons.

ts.description: Unix epoch milliseconds (absolute) at the moment the beacon was emitted, as measured by the client clock. Absolute timestamps ensure every beacon is independently interpretable — relative offsets would become unresolvable if session_open is dropped in transit.

event.description: Beacon type. Drives which additional fields are present.

state.description: State machine state at the moment the beacon was emitted. Omitted only on session_open (state is implicitly play_attempt).

metrics.description: Accumulated QoE metrics at beacon time. Included on all beacons except session_open. Each beacon carries the full cumulative snapshot, so any single beacon can reconstruct session health without prior context.

playhead_ms.description: Current playhead position in the content timeline in milliseconds. Required on heartbeat. Also present on pause and session_end beacons, capturing the last known position at each session boundary.
Current playhead position in the content timeline in milliseconds. Used to detect stalls and validate metrics on the server.
Last known playhead position in milliseconds at the time the beacon was emitted.

seek_from_ms.description: Playhead position before the seek began, in milliseconds. Present on both seek_start and seek_end.

seek_to_ms.description: Target playhead position in milliseconds. Present on seek_end; may be absent on seek_start if the target is not yet known.

Metrics.description: Cumulative QoE metrics. All durations are in milliseconds. All counts are non-negative integers.

vst_ms.description: Video Start Time: elapsed ms from play_attempt to first_frame. Null until first_frame is received.

played_ms.description: Cumulative time in the Playing state.

rebuffer_ms.description: Cumulative time in the Rebuffering state.

watched_ms.description: Total elapsed time from play_attempt to now. Inclusive of buffering, rebuffering, playing, seeking, and paused time.

rebuffer_count.description: Number of discrete rebuffer events (each rebuffer_start increments this).

error_count.description: Number of error events emitted, fatal and non-fatal combined.

id.description: Unique content identifier supplied by the integrator.

user_agent.description: Full user agent string from the runtime environment.

api_version.description: Beacon schema version. Increment when making breaking changes to this schema. Currently 1.

QualityLevel.description: Rendition quality at the time of a quality_change event.

bitrate_bps.description: Selected rendition bitrate in bits per second.

codec.description: Codec string as reported by the player (e.g. 'avc1.4d401f', 'hvc1').

message.description: Human-readable description from the player, if available.

fatal.description: True if the error terminates the session and transitions the state machine to Error.
